name: Stryde AirRun Pro
description: Lightweight running shoe with responsive foam cushioning and breathable mesh upper. Designed for long-distance road running with superior energy return.
materials: Mesh upper, EVA midsole, rubber outsole

name: Stryde TrailBlazer X
description: All-terrain trail running shoe with aggressive lugged outsole and protective toe cap. Built for rugged trails and off-road adventures.
materials: Synthetic upper, TPU frame, Vibram outsole

name: Stryde SpeedElite
description: Carbon fiber plate racing shoe for elite performance. Ultra-lightweight with maximum energy return for race day speed.
materials: Knit upper, carbon fiber plate, PEBA foam

name: Stryde RecoveryStep
description: Post-workout recovery sandal with contoured footbed and arch support. Reduces fatigue after intense training sessions.
materials: EVA footbed, nylon strap, rubber outsole

name: Stryde FlexTrain Cross
description: Versatile cross-training shoe with lateral support and flat heel for weightlifting stability. Suitable for gym, HIIT, and agility drills.
materials: Synthetic leather upper, flat rubber outsole, foam midsole

name: Stryde CoreTight Pro
description: High-waist compression tights with moisture-wicking fabric and side phone pocket. Four-way stretch for unrestricted movement.

name: Stryde FlexShort 5"
description: Lightweight training shorts with 5-inch inseam, built-in liner, and zippered back pocket. Quick-dry fabric for high-intensity workouts.

name: Stryde AeroShort Women
description: Women's running shorts with built-in compression shorts, reflective details, and two side pockets. Designed for comfort during long runs.

name: Stryde SweatFlex Jogger
description: Tapered jogger pants with brushed fleece interior for warmth. Features elastic waistband with drawstring and two zip pockets.

name: Stryde DryFit Tee
description: Classic training t-shirt with moisture-wicking DryFit technology. Flatlock seams prevent chafing during intense workouts.

name: Stryde PowerTank Women
description: Women's racerback tank top with built-in shelf bra and moisture-wicking fabric. Lightweight and breathable for high-intensity training.

name: Stryde ThermoLayer Hoodie
description: Midlayer hoodie with thermal fleece interior and water-resistant outer shell. Kangaroo pocket and adjustable hood for outdoor training.
use_case: Outdoor running, cold weather training, casual

name: Stryde ZipCore Jacket
description: Full-zip training jacket with four-way stretch fabric and underarm ventilation panels. Slim fit design with thumb holes.

name: Stryde StrongBra Max
description: High-impact sports bra with underwire support, adjustable straps, and moisture-wicking fabric. Designed for running and high-intensity activities.

name: Stryde YogaFlow Bra
description: Medium-impact sports bra with removable padding and open back design. Soft fabric ideal for yoga, pilates, and light training.

name: Stryde GripGloves
description: Fingerless training gloves with silicone grip palm and wrist support strap. Protects hands during weightlifting and cross-training.
materials: Synthetic leather palm, neoprene back, velcro strap

name: Stryde RunCap Lite
description: Lightweight running cap with moisture-wicking sweatband and UV protection. Adjustable rear strap for secure fit.

name: Stryde ProSock 3-Pack
description: Cushioned running socks with arch support band and blister-resistant flat-toe seam. Pack of 3 pairs.

name: Stryde HydraVest
description: Running hydration vest with 2L bladder compatibility, multiple storage pockets, and reflective strips. Fits close to body to minimize bounce.

name: Stryde ResistBand Set
description: Set of 5 resistance bands in varying tension levels (Extra Light to Extra Heavy). Ideal for strength training, mobility, and rehabilitation.

name: Stryde FoamRoller Pro
description: High-density textured foam roller for deep tissue massage and myofascial release. 45cm length suitable for full back and leg rolling.
materials: EVA foam over hollow ABS core

name: Stryde JumpRope Speed
description: Ball-bearing speed jump rope with adjustable cable length and ergonomic foam handles. Suitable for double-unders and cardio training.
materials: Steel cable with PVC coating, aluminum handles

name: Stryde YogaMat Premium
description: 6mm thick non-slip yoga mat with alignment lines and carrying strap. Eco-friendly TPE material with excellent grip on both sides.

name: Stryde WristWrap Pro
description: Heavy-duty wrist wraps with thumb loop and hook-and-loop closure. Provides wrist stability during heavy lifts.

name: Stryde CompressionSleeve Calf
description: Graduated compression calf sleeves for improved circulation and reduced muscle fatigue. Can be worn during or after exercise.

name: Stryde WindBreaker Lite
description: Packable windbreaker jacket with water-resistant coating and mesh lining. Folds into its own pocket for easy storage.

name: Stryde ThermoBase Layer
description: Long sleeve base layer with thermal regulation technology. Keeps you warm in cold conditions without overheating during activity.
use_case: Cold weather running, skiing, outdoor training

name: Stryde GymBag Pro
description: Large capacity gym duffel bag with separate wet/dry compartment, shoe pocket, and padded laptop sleeve. Durable and water-resistant.

name: Stryde RunPack 10L
description: Compact running backpack with hydration bladder sleeve, trekking pole attachment, and reflective details. Ergonomic fit with sternum strap.

name: Stryde SportWatch S1
description: GPS sports watch with heart rate monitor, sleep tracking, and 20+ sport modes. 7-day battery life with 5ATM water resistance.
use_case: Running, cycling, swimming, general fitness tracking

name: Stryde EarPods Sport
description: True wireless earbuds with ear hooks for secure fit during exercise. IPX5 sweat resistant, 8 hours battery with charging case.

name: Stryde HydraBottle 750ml
description: Double-wall insulated stainless steel bottle. Keeps drinks cold 24 hours or hot 12 hours. Leak-proof lid with carry loop.

name: Stryde KneeGuard Pro
description: Compression knee sleeve with patella support ring and anti-slip silicone strips. Provides stability without restricting movement.

name: Stryde PowerShort Men
description: Men's compression shorts with 9-inch inseam and heat-mapped ventilation zones. Reduces muscle vibration during heavy training.

name: Stryde LongTight Men
description: Men's full-length running tights with reflective details and back zip pocket. Four-way stretch fabric with flatlock seams.

name: Stryde ActivePolo
description: Technical polo shirt with moisture-wicking fabric and UV protection. Three-button placket and self-fabric collar.

name: Stryde AgilityShoe Women
description: Women's training shoe with pivot point outsole for multi-directional movement. Extra cushioning in heel for comfort during long training sessions.
materials: Mesh upper, rubber pivot outsole, foam midsole

name: Stryde LiftShoe Flat
description: Dedicated weightlifting shoe with elevated heel (0.6 inch), metatarsal strap, and non-compressible outsole for maximum power transfer.
materials: Leather upper, wooden heel block, rubber outsole

name: Stryde NightRun Vest
description: High-visibility running vest with 360-degree reflective strips and LED light attachment point. Lightweight and adjustable for layering.
use_case: Night running, road cycling, outdoor safety

name: Stryde MassageGun Mini
description: Compact percussion massage gun with 4 attachment heads and 3 speed settings. Quiet motor under 45dB, 3 hour battery life.
materials: ABS plastic body, stainless steel shaft
